items.title: heroiclabs/nakama
items.description: Scalable open-source game backend server: multiplayer, matchmaking, leaderboards, chat, and social features for games.
items.cn_summary: 可扩展开源游戏后端，支持多人、匹配、排行榜。

items.title: anthropics/claude-code
items.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
items.cn_summary: 终端中的智能编码工具，理解代码库并加速开发。

items.title: usestrix/strix
items.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
items.cn_summary: 开源AI渗透测试工具，自动发现应用漏洞。

items.title: Tencent EdgeOne Makers
items.description: Ship AI agents like web apps, in minutes.
items.cn_summary: 快速部署AI代理，像发布网页应用一样简单

items.title: Embodied.cpp: A Portable Inference Runtime of Embodied AI Models on Heterogeneous Robots
items.description: Embodied AI models now span vision-language-action (VLA) models and world-action models (WAMs), but practical deployment remains fragmented across model-specific Python stacks, backend assumptions, and robot-side glue code, especially on heterogeneous edge devices. Existing inference runtimes are designed mainly for request-response serving and therefore do not satisfy the runtime contract of embodied deployment: multi-rate execution inside closed-loop control, latency-first batch-1 inference on
items.cn_summary: 为异构机器人提供具身AI模型便携推理运行时
